item.title: How To Apply Smooth Eyeliner on Wrinkled Eyelids
item.description: The wrinkles on our eyelids can make eyeliner more challenging to apply evenly. Want to learn the best tips for applying eyeliner on wrinkled eyelids? Please watch this video for a step-by-step instruction and please don't forget to like/share/subscribe if you enjoy this tutorial. xox Smitha

media:content.media:title: How To Apply Smooth Eyeliner on Wrinkled Eyelids
media:content.media:description: The wrinkles on our eyelids can make eyeliner more challenging to apply evenly. Want to learn the best tips for applying eyeliner on wrinkled eyelids? Please watch this video for a step-by-step instruction and please don't forget to like/share/subscribe if you enjoy this tutorial. xox Smitha
